nl_query: Display the active honorarium rate card name and its board coordinator weight.
failed_sql: SELECT hrc.name, bc.honorarium_weight FROM honorarium_rate_card hrc JOIN board_coordinator bc ON hrc.id = bc.board_coordinator_id WHERE hrc.is_active = TRUE AND bc.effective_from <= CURRENT_DATE AND (bc.effective_to IS NULL OR bc.effective_to >= CURRENT_DATE)
